title: Drag and Drop Reordering

statement.markdown:
## Drag-and-Drop List Reordering

Create a list where items can be re-ordered interactively using Native HTML5 Drag and Drop events.

### Requirements:
1. **Draggable Items**: Set proper HTML attributes to make items draggable.
2. **Drag Visuals**: Apply a temporary lower opacity (`opacity-50`) to the active dragging item while it is being dragged.
3. **Drag Over Highlight**: Apply border styles dynamically to target drop containers when an item is dragged over them.
4. **Reorder Logic**: On drop, swap the position of the dragged item with the target item in the DOM.

constraints: Must utilize standard HTML5 drag and drop events (dragstart, dragover, drop, dragend)
Must reorder DOM nodes cleanly based on drop target positions

starterCode.html:
Rank Priorities

  • 1. Deploy code to production☰
  • 2. Review security scan reports☰
  • 3. Refactor legacy module database logic☰
  • 4. Conduct team sprint planning☰

gradingCriteria.description: Verify dragstart adds opacity classes, dragover is intercepted, and drop swaps items properly in list order.
Verify clean event listener registration, preventDefault use on dragover to enable drops, and correct node index adjustments.
